name: Spaceship Survivors
short_description: Spaceship Survivors is an anime-style arena survivor roguelike where you play in space to fight against loads of alien spaceships. Create unique builds to survive and kill the final boss, or go for an endless run. You can unlock 33 playable spaceships.
detailed_description:
Update Notes


It looks like the game will be released on May 15th. Thank you all for your patience. In return, I have added two gift skins to the game at launch that will be available to everyone. More news is coming soon.


About the Game

Spaceship Survivors is an anime-style arena survivor roguelike where you play in space to fight against loads of alien spaceships.
Create unique builds to survive and kill the final boss, or go for an endless run. You can unlock 33 playable spaceships.
If you need more challenge, then the speed run mode is your go-to.

70+ skill items
33 playable spaceships
4 spaceship classes
3 unique difficulty levels
Speedrun mode
10 legendary spaceships with unique starting skills
8 pilots with a progress system
Unlimited build variations
